subheadline: We're in the Stadtmitte district, a five-minute walk from the central station. Choose the route that suits you.

routes.description: Take the U2 or U4 to Stadtmitte. Leave via the Marktplatz exit, then walk two blocks north on Königstraße. We're at number 14, third floor.
From the A3, take exit 52 and follow signs for Zentrum. Paid parking is available in the Markt-Galerie garage, a two-minute walk from the entrance.
From the central station main hall, head east toward Königstraße. Stay on the left-hand side and you'll reach our blue glass entrance in about five minutes.
